title: JFH (just for hardcore)
description: this modpack adds tons of stuff that the perfect hardcore world would need, it's made for multiplayer but works for singleplayer too, it adds stuff like biomes, better world gen, bigger caves, voice chat, furniture and much much more
body:
adds tons of fun stuff to make minecraft more difficult while balancing some other stuff, multiplayer is free since this pack has the essential mod, this pack also includes, hardcore revive (revive them before they die)
biomes
and tons of fun QOL stuff
